betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Solar Panel§f is the §6ground-based renewable energy§f block in the AR progression. It generates §6RF power§f from §6direct sunlight§f and outputs to a §6Forge Power Output§f (libvulpes:forgepoweroutput) face. Solar panels are the §6primary power source§f for any §6surface-based AR machine§f and the §6Solar Generator§f (chain) multiblock.

§6Production Path (advancedRocketryTweaks.zs:39, replaces "advancedrocketry:solarpanel")§f:
- Type: §6minecraft:crafting_shaped§f
- Pattern (3×3):
  ```
  r r r
  g b g
  p p p
  ```
- Key: `r`=§6dustRedstone§f, `g`=§6dustGlowstone§f, `b`=§6libvulpes:structuremachine§f, `p`=§6plateGold§f
- Output: 1x §6Solar Panel§f (advancedrocketry:solarpanel)
- Power: §620 RF/t per panel§f in §6direct daylight§f
- The CT tweak removes the original `advancedrocketry:solarpanel` recipe and substitutes the §6HBM Photovoltaic Panel§f + libvulpes structure

The solar panel requires a §6clear sky view§f to operate — placing it underground, under a roof, or at night reduces output to zero. Panels also lose efficiency at §6high latitudes§f where the sun is low on the horizon. The panel outputs to a §6Forge Power Output Hatch§f on its bottom face.

The solar panel is a prerequisite for the §6Solar Generator§f (chain), the §6Black Hole Generator§f (10083), and the §6Microwave Receiver§f (10084). It is the §6most-produced AR power block§f — a single §6Solar Array Panel§f (solararraypanel.json) gives 8x solar panels in a 3×3 pattern.

§eTip§f: Build a §6Solar Array Panel§f (3×3 with §6Structure Tower§f at center) for §68x solar panels§f in a single craft. Pair with a §6Fusion Reactor§f (chain) for night-time backup. Solar panels can be chained side-by-side; the §6Forge Power Output§f can be connected to a §6Tesseract§f or §6EnderIO Power Conduit§f for long-distance transmission.
